sources.notes: FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Bosnia and Herzegovina bbox. Returns recent events (magnitude, depth, time, location). Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json.

sources.authority: Meteoalarm (via FHMZ BiH / RHMZ RS meteorological services)
sources.notes: Meteoalarm machine-readable per-country warnings feed for Bosnia and Herzegovina. CAP-derived JSON with EMMA_ID area codes and color-coded alert levels. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

Open-Meteo Flood API exposing GloFAS ensemble river-discharge forecasts, sampled at Sarajevo / the Miljacka–Bosna basin. Keyless flood-risk signal relevant to the 2014-style Sava/Bosna flooding. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: EFFIS — European Forest Fire Information System (Copernicus / JRC)
sources.notes: EFFIS OGC WMS covering pan-European fire danger, active fires and burnt areas — includes Bosnia and Herzegovina. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/vnd.ogc.wms_xml (OGC XML).

Energy-Charts public API exposing Bosnian electricity day-ahead prices and market data (CC BY 4.0). No API key required. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json (rate-limited; retry on HTTP 429).
Open-Meteo air-quality API (CAMS) sampled at Sarajevo: PM10, PM2.5 and European AQI — relevant given Sarajevo's severe winter smog. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (UN/EC)
sources.notes: GDACS multi-hazard event list (floods, earthquakes, wildfires) as GeoJSON; filter by country in the feature properties. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.
